category_sources: Official Exim repository describes Exim as a Mail Transport Agent.
display_name_sources: Official Exim repository and website use Exim.
docs_sources: Official Exim docs page identifies the specification as the master documentation for installing, configuring, and using Exim.
Official Exim documentation page lists the main specification, filter specification, FAQ, HOWTOs, and copies of documentation.
repo_sources: Exim's repository README says GitHub is no longer updated and identifies code.exim.org/exim/exim.git as the official repository.
tags_sources: Official Exim repository topics and description identify email, SMTP, and MTA roles.
source_facts.description identifies Exim as a sendmail replacement.
